news.t: AI-Driven ETF Close to Hitting $100M in Just 3 Months
Pictet Grows U.S. Lineup With 2 Active EM ETFs
Pictet Asset Management Launches Pictet AI Enhanced US Equity ETF (PQUS)

holdings.infoBox: PQUS is an equity ETF with a total of 161 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.80%, Apple at 6.99%, Microsoft at 4.31%, Amazon.com at 3.43%, and Broadcom at 3.37%.

overview.description: The Pictet AI Enhanced US Equity ETF (PQUS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that employs artificial intelligence to invest in large-cap US companies. PQUS was launched on Feb 25, 2026 and is issued by Pictet.

data.title: AI-Driven ETF Close to Hitting $100M in Just 3 Months
data.text: The rapid deployment of artificial intelligence (AI) is evident; 99% of CEOs say their companies are investing in the technology. Apparently, AI is also quick at garnering assets.

data.title: Pictet Asset Management Launches Pictet AI Enhanced US Equity ETF (PQUS)
